name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.10.0: Styles + Numbering + Sections foundation (closes #46 #47 #48) — 19 new MCP tools (style inheritance chain / link / latentStyles / alias + numbering definition lifecycle + section sectPr completeness) + 6 extended args on create_style/update_style. Built on ooxml-swift v0.16.0. v3.9.0: Content Controls (SDT) read/write (#44). v3.8.0: header/footer raw-element preservation (#52). v3.7.2: #42 verify follow-ups. v3.7.1: update_all_fields header preservation (#42). v3.7.0: autosave Design B + insert crash hardening (#40 #41).
